subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1900
subcodes.first_line: I answered all the questions of the people the other evening, both those on their lips and those in their hearts. One among them was [a] Jew
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @station of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @Christ; Christianity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @crucifixion; ascension of Christ
